positive: Minimalist celestial journey. A pair of abstract, stylized, glowing hot air balloons carrying a solitary figure (abstractly rendered, gender-neutral) ascending through a dreamy, bioluminescent nebula sky. The balloons are designed with clean, geometric silhouettes and filled with stylized constellations and deep space elements (neptune blues, deep violets, electric teals). The setting sun casts a strong, ethereal rim light on the ascending balloons and figure. Style: Modern tattoo flash art meets Art Nouveau poster illustration, highly detailed line work, strong contrast against a dark background. Composition: Central, vertical composition with strong leading lines drawing the eye upward. Print-friendly, vector illustration style, high contrast, suitable for apparel printing, solid color regions preferred.
negative: blurry, low quality, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, deformed, malformed, grainy, poor anatomy, extra limbs, jpeg artifacts, noisy, busy background, photorealism, 3d render, messy, clutter
